entities.name: Air Operations Center
entities.description: Primary command and control node for air operations. Responsible for planning, coordinating, and executing air missions.

entities.name: Strike Package
entities.description: A group of aircraft assigned to a specific mission or target.

entities.name: Intelligence Unit
entities.description: Provides intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance support.

entities.name: Logistics Command
entities.description: Manages supply chain and resource allocation for operations.

entities.name: Target Identification Capability
entities.description: Capability to identify and prioritize targets for engagement.

entities.name: Mission Planning System
entities.description: System for planning and coordinating air missions.

entities.name: Weather Service
entities.description: Provides weather data and forecasts for mission planning.

relationships.name: Commands
relationships.description: AOC commands the Strike Package for mission execution.

relationships.name: Provides Intelligence To
relationships.description: Intelligence Unit provides intelligence support to AOC.

relationships.name: Requires
relationships.description: Strike Package requires Target Identification Capability.

relationships.name: Uses
relationships.description: AOC uses Mission Planning System for operations.

relationships.name: Provides Data To
relationships.description: Weather Service provides data to Mission Planning System.

relationships.name: Coordinates With
relationships.description: Intelligence Unit coordinates with Strike Package.
